name: coGetVersionInfo
title: coGetVersionInfo
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coGetVersionInfo( char buffer[], dword bufferSize, dword errCode[] );
The function returns the current version number of the node layer used.
buffer Buffer for the version number
buffersize Size of the buffer in bytes
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
Example dword errCode[1];char buffer[128];coGetVersionInfo( buffer, elCount(buffer), errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "Used Node layer version: %s", buffer ); }
